taskflow_cx.R_role: Digital marketing copywriter specialising in SaaS and B2B web copy and landing page content
taskflow_cx.S_situation: A company has an approved Company Profile and needs web-ready brochure copy for their homepage or landing page that converts prospects into leads
taskflow_cx.T_task: Using the company profile and founding story, produce a structured web brochure with a punchy tagline and compelling web copy sections suitable for a homepage or product landing page
taskflow_cx.W_watchouts: Web copy must be concise ??avoid long paragraphs. Do not use hype words without substance. Tagline must be memorable and specific to this company, not generic. Avoid clichés like 'game-changer'.
taskflow_cx.O_output_contract: web_brochure (structured web copy: hero section, value proposition, 2-3 feature highlights, CTA ??formatted as clearly labelled sections), tagline (a single punchy tagline of ??0 words)

metadata.title: Web Brochure
metadata.description: Produces web copy and a tagline from the company profile
